curatedSets.name: 1.93 Savage bis

evaluation.objective: Expected damage of a single 100-potency physical hit from independently recalculated gear stats.
evaluation.limitation: This profile compares gear and meld stats; it does not simulate the job rotation, job gauge, raid buffs, encounter timing, downtime, or movement.

assumptions: Source record uses a five percent party bonus.
Source clan: Keeper of the Moon.
No source notes were provided; set name and published totals are preserved without inferred intent.
The Balance guide independently recommends this exact equipment, meld, and food combination as 1.93 Savage bis.
